title: Curtains Up on the Drama Club Musical

all.en: Auditions for the spring musical were announced on a chilly Monday morning in February.
all.zh: 春季音樂劇的試鏡在二月一個寒冷的星期一早上公布了。

all.en: Yi-ping had dreamed of playing the lead role ever since she was twelve years old.
all.zh: 怡萍從十二歲起就夢想著飾演女主角。

all.en: She practiced her chosen song every night in front of her bedroom mirror.
all.zh: 她每晚都在臥室鏡子前練習她選的那首歌。

all.en: Her best friend, Chih-hao, decided to try out for a comedic supporting character.
all.zh: 她最好的朋友志豪決定試鏡一個搞笑的配角。

all.en: On audition day, thirty hopeful students gathered nervously in the small black box theater.
all.zh: 試鏡當天，三十位滿懷期待的學生緊張地聚集在小型黑盒劇場裡。

all.en: Yi-ping's voice trembled at first, but slowly her singing grew strong and confident.
all.zh: 怡萍一開始聲音顫抖，但慢慢地她的歌聲變得有力又自信。

all.en: The drama teacher, Mr. Lin, listened with his eyes closed and a thoughtful smile.
all.zh: 戲劇老師林老師閉著眼睛聽著，臉上掛著若有所思的微笑。

all.en: Three days later, the cast list was finally posted on the bulletin board outside.
all.zh: 三天後，演員名單終於張貼在外面的公布欄上。

all.en: Yi-ping had been chosen as the female lead, and she screamed with disbelief and joy.
all.zh: 怡萍被選為女主角，她驚喜得不敢相信地尖叫起來。

all.en: Chih-hao got his funny role and immediately began inventing exaggerated facial expressions.
all.zh: 志豪得到了他那個搞笑的角色，立刻開始發明誇張的臉部表情。

all.en: Rehearsals started after school every weekday from four o'clock until nearly seven.
all.zh: 排練從週一到週五每天放學後四點開始，一直練到將近七點。

all.en: Learning twelve songs, six dances, and a hundred lines proved harder than anyone expected.
all.zh: 要學十二首歌、六支舞和一百句台詞，比任何人預期的都還難。

all.en: The set crew built a charming wooden village square using donated paint and old plywood.
all.zh: 舞台組用捐贈的油漆和舊夾板搭出了一個迷人的木造村莊廣場。

all.en: Costumes were sewn by parent volunteers who worked every Saturday in the home economics room.
all.zh: 戲服由家長志工縫製，他們每個星期六都在家政教室裡工作。

all.en: Halfway through March, Yi-ping caught a bad cold and lost her voice for almost a week.
all.zh: 三月中旬，怡萍得了重感冒，幾乎一週都發不出聲音。

all.en: Her understudy, a shy girl named Wen-ling, stepped in to cover rehearsals during her absence.
all.zh: 她的替角，一位名叫文玲的害羞女孩，在她缺席期間頂替排練。

all.en: Yi-ping worried Wen-ling might actually be better, and that thought kept her awake at night.
all.zh: 怡萍擔心文玲可能真的更出色，這個念頭讓她夜裡睡不著。

all.en: When she returned, she discovered Wen-ling had cheered everyone up but missed her terribly.
all.zh: 當她回來時，她發現文玲讓大家都很開心，但每個人都非常想念她。

all.en: Yi-ping decided to teach Wen-ling vocal techniques so she could shine in future shows.
all.zh: 怡萍決定教文玲發聲技巧，讓她在未來的演出中能發光發熱。

all.en: Tech week arrived, and suddenly the lights, microphones, and sound effects all needed testing.
all.zh: 技術週到了，燈光、麥克風和音效突然全都需要測試。

all.en: During one dress rehearsal, Chih-hao's wig fell off in the middle of his big song.
all.zh: 在一次彩排時，志豪的假髮在他重頭歌曲的中段掉了下來。

all.en: He picked it up smoothly and pretended it was part of the joke, earning loud laughs.
all.zh: 他自然地撿起假髮，假裝那是笑點的一部分，引來陣陣笑聲。

all.en: Mr. Lin praised his quick thinking and reminded everyone that mistakes can become magic.
all.zh: 林老師稱讚他反應敏捷，提醒大家錯誤也能變成魔法。

all.en: On opening night, the auditorium was packed with families, friends, and curious strangers.
all.zh: 首演之夜，禮堂擠滿了家人、朋友和好奇的陌生人。

all.en: Backstage, Yi-ping closed her eyes and breathed deeply to settle her racing heart.
all.zh: 後台，怡萍閉上眼睛深呼吸，平撫她狂跳的心。

all.en: The curtain rose, the orchestra began to play, and the magic of theater filled the room.
all.zh: 幕簾升起，樂團開始演奏，劇場的魔力充滿了整個空間。

all.en: Yi-ping sang her first solo with such emotion that the audience grew completely silent.
all.zh: 怡萍唱第一首獨唱時情感如此飽滿，全場觀眾都靜了下來。

all.en: Chih-hao made an old grandmother in the third row laugh until she had to wipe her eyes.
all.zh: 志豪逗得第三排一位老奶奶笑到必須擦眼淚。

all.en: During the love duet, Yi-ping forgot one line, but her partner gently improvised forward.
all.zh: 在情歌對唱時，怡萍忘了一句台詞，但她的搭檔溫和地即興接了過去。

all.en: By the final number, the cast moved together like one breathing, joyful, glowing family.
all.zh: 到了最終曲，全體演員像一個共同呼吸、充滿喜悅、閃閃發光的家庭般協調演出。

all.en: When the curtain fell, the audience rose to their feet and clapped for almost three minutes.
all.zh: 當布幕落下時，觀眾全體起立鼓掌了將近三分鐘。

all.en: Backstage, students hugged, cried happy tears, and took dozens of slightly blurry photos.
all.zh: 後台，學生們相擁、流下喜悅的淚水，並拍下了幾十張有點模糊的照片。

all.en: Mr. Lin gathered the cast and quietly told them he had never been prouder of any group.
all.zh: 林老師把演員們聚在一起，輕聲告訴他們他從未為任何一組學生這樣自豪過。

all.en: Yi-ping realized that the months of stress and tears had all been worth this single night.
all.zh: 怡萍領悟到，這幾個月的壓力與眼淚全都是為了這一晚而值得。

all.en: Walking home under the streetlights, she already missed the show before it was truly over.
all.zh: 走在街燈下回家的路上，演出還沒真正結束，她就已經開始想念了。
